title: Dawn of the Mask
description: A Minecraft Mod For The Shonen Anime Bleach
body:
# Kamen no Reimei (仮面の黎明)
## Dawn Of The Mask

This mod has been in the works for 1 Month now and I Made Some Progress
This is Only A Small Showcase for All of you To Test And Rate the Mod
This Is A Very Early Testing Of The Mod So it Has Too much Bugs to Count But i just wanted to 

get it Out There
PLEASE READ!
REQUIRES KLEIDERS_CUSTOM RENDERER AND PLAYER ANIMATOR
{If you are reviewing the mod on any video or stream, do

'/give "your name" dawn_of_the_mask_kamen_no_reimei:god'
[this the first time i seen someone play my mods im actually so hyped up rn]

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/2AOvskk6uck" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

And Obviously Report the Bugs for Me to Fix

This Mod WILL BE BIG!

In this Mod you Aquire The Soul Reaper Abilities
Flash Stepping
Reiatsu Control
And Reiatsu Controlled Moves/Techniques

Hollows Spawn Rarely So Its hard to find Hollows Roaming around your world

The Hollows in the mod:

FishBone D
Grandfisher
Leaches
Shrieker
